reviews.review_description: I played this just now on my Quest 3 and it appears to be broken and unplayable. I started in a strange corridor with changing colours and things like axes just stationary and floating that I couldn't interact with and could walk through. There was a door at the end that kept opening and closing but there was no way to walk through it. Everything behind the door was stretched and looked broken as well.

reviews.review_title: Try it out, support if you wish, thx
reviews.review_description:
As the sole creator behind JaiwisWorlds, now embarking on its journey at the Oculus store, I stand at a unique crossroads of creation and reflection. Hesitation is as much a part of this process as the code itself, a silent partner in the alchemy of development.

This world I offer you is alive with potential, yet I must confess it remains in its nascent stages—unrefined but brimming with promise. I extend my heartfelt apologies to those adventurers who find it still basic; your patience fuels the very core of this evolving universe.

Updates flow continuously—weekly, sometimes daily—as I weave new threads into the fabric of this experience. Imagine JaiwisWorlds as a living entity, each gigabyte gaining wisdom, slowly yet unyieldingly, much like the ancient turtle that carries the world on its back.

Please, join me in nurturing this seed. Together, we will watch it surge towards the skies,  fuels the very core of this evolving universe.

Your support and understanding are the cornerstones upon which JaiwisWorlds will realize its full potential. I am committed to this odyssey, to lifting the veil on new virtual horizons and delivering the magic we all seek.

With gratitude and anticipation,

Jaiwi
Creator of JaiwiWorlds
